lines.speaker: Grimgnash
lines.text: Grargk! Grimgnash not care for stupid human things! Grimgnash hungry!

sections.title: Trying to take from the pile of feathers

lines.speaker: Grimgnash
lines.text: Grahh! What human doing? Why human here? Grimgnash hungry!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uh...er...sorry! I didn't mean to disturb you. I'll just be going now.

sections.title: Trying to talk to Grimgnash from too far away

lines.speaker: Grimgnash
lines.text: What you want, little human? Grimgnash hungry. Want tasty morsel like you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Like me? Why? Who are you?

lines.speaker: Grimgnash
lines.text: I Grimgnash and I hungry! Perhaps I eat you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm really not that tasty. I think I should be going now. Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Grimgnash
lines.text: Human lucky Grimgnash too tired to hunt for food. Stupid wolves keep Grimgnash awake with howling. Grimgnash can't sleep.
